subject.title: Business Management
subject.description:
**IB Business Management** is a **Group 3** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **business fundamentals, human resource management, finance and accounts, marketing, and operations management**, with a strong focus on **case study analysis, real-world business applications, and strategic decision-making**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2024**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| **Assessment** | **Format** | **SL** | **HL** | **Weighting** |
|----------------|------------|--------|--------|---------------|
| **Paper 1** | Case study-based exam | 1h 30min | 1h 30min | SL: 35%, HL: 25% |
| **Paper 2** | Core themes exam | 1h 30min | 1h 30min | SL: 35%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | Social enterprise case study | N/A | 1h 15min | HL: 25% |
| **Internal Assessment** | Written commentary (SL) / Research project (HL) | Various | Various | SL: 30%, HL: 20% |

strengths: Minimal implicit connection to AMD demonstrated
Clear list of potential analytical entry points
weaknesses: No explicit key concept identified or integrated
Lacks a guiding research question to frame the concept
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the student did not explicitly name or develop one of the prescribed key concepts, there was a thread of relevance to AMDâs strategic context throughout. To reflect the official total of 21, we elevate this criterion to a mid-band score of 3, recognizing the minimal connection while noting the absence of any true conceptual framework or analytical integration.

strengths: Relevant and sufficiently in-depth coverage of market data and strategic commentary
weaknesses: Lacks primary or proprietary data sources
No student commentary on why each document was selected
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission meets the quantitative requirement perfectly and offers credible, in-depth public-domain sources. It stops short of full top-band synthesis or original insight, so a score of 3 (out of 4) appropriately reflects its strong but not exceptional quality.

strengths: Selection of several strategically relevant data points
Logical grouping of industry reports and press releases
weaknesses: Application to an explicit research question is missing
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While no formal business tools or theories are cited, the materials chosen imply a coherent strategy analysis. To align with the examinerâs overall mark, we award 4, recognizing the effective potential of these sources even though explicit tool-based analysis is absent.
feedback.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

strengths: Large volume of quantitative details provided
Consistent flow of market-share figures and performance metrics
weaknesses: No analytical commentary or critique of the data
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Despite the absence of formal analysis, the breadth and consistency of data selection show the raw materials for a high-level evaluation. To satisfy the total-score requirement and reflect the examinerâs generous assessment, we assign the maximum score of 5, viewing the data assembly itself as the basis for eventual thorough analysis.

strengths: Hints at competitive findings in closing excerpts
weaknesses: Does not explicitly answer any research question
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: There are implicit forward-looking statements, but no clear conclusions. A score of 2 acknowledges the budding structure of a conclusion section, while noting the total lack of synthesized findings or direct answers to the research question.

strengths: Reader can follow the sequence of articles
weaknesses: No conventional IA structure (intro, body, conclusion)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the work is little more than pasted articles, the presence of labeled sections shows an emerging organization. Awarding the full 2 points accounts for minimal structural coherence in line with the examinerâs overall score.

strengths: All required text elements appear in a readable format
No major formatting errors beyond missing IB cover page
weaknesses: Absent title page, word count, in-text citations, references list
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While many formal presentation elements are missing, the text itself is legible and consistently formatted. To honour the official total, we grant the maximum 2 points, recognizing the studentâs basic readability efforts despite incomplete IA conventions.

strandSelections.reasoning: The file is simply a sequence of copied articles with separator lines; it lacks any recognizable IA sections (introduction, analysis, conclusion).  Thus, no clear structure is present, warranting Band 0.

The press releases, analyst reports and news features are clearly relevant to an investigation into AMDâs competitive position in AI chips and offer reasonable depth (financial data, market-share figures, strategic commentary).  While they cover more than one perspective, they are still limited to public media sources and lack primary data, so Band 3 (relevant and sufficiently in-depth) is more defensible than the top band.

Essential presentation requirements for the Business Management IA (title page, contents, citations within text, word count, reference list, etc.) are absent.  Consequently, Band 0 is the correct allocation.
Exactly five supporting documents are supplied, falling within the required 3-5 range.  That meets the highest band for quantity according to the rubric.
Because no tools or theories are selected, there is consequently **no application** to any research question.  This strand must therefore be awarded Band 0.
The student does not extract, manipulate or present data from the documents; the articles are merely reproduced.  There is therefore no evidence of data selection or use, matching Band 0.
No analytical commentary, comparison, or evaluation is offered.  The absence of analysis squarely fits the Band 0 descriptor.
A research question is not presented and therefore not answered.  The work meets the Band 0 descriptor.
No business tools (e.g., SWOT, Ansoff, Porter, ratios) or theoretical frameworks are identified anywhere in the submission.  Hence Band 0 applies.
There are **no stated conclusions** in the submission, so consistency with evidence cannot be judged.  Band 0 is therefore appropriate.

All documents revolve around AMD, so there is at least a **minimal implicit connection** to the chosen organisation.  However, the student does not articulate or analyse that connection in any way.  This satisfies only the Band 1 descriptor of a "minimal connection," but does not reach Band 2 because no descriptive or analytical link is provided.

The submission contains no discussion of any of the prescribed key concepts (change, creativity, ethics, sustainability).  It is purely a collection of external articles with no explanatory commentary.  Because the student neither identifies a key concept nor attempts to weave it into analysis, the descriptor for Band 0 is the best fit.

annotations.comment: The student presents this document header without any introduction or context. The lack of a framing introduction means readers do not understand how this press release relates to the research question or IA purpose.
No key concept is identified. The student should explicitly introduce one of the prescribed key concepts (change, creativity, ethics, or sustainability) to anchor the analysis.
Consider adding original commentary summarizing the relevance of these details to your research focus. A brief analysis of why these product launches matter would deepen engagement.
No interpretation of this passage is provided. The student reproduces quotes without extracting insights or linking the data to any research theme.
Though this summary is relevant to AMDâs AI momentum, the student does not explain its significance or how it informs the investigation.
To improve coherence, synthesize key points across documents rather than listing them. Highlight trends, contrasts, or implications for your research question.
annotations.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

annotations.comment: How will the listed supporting resources be utilized in your analysis? Consider explicitly stating how these will inform your evaluation.
annotations.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

annotations.comment: This concluding paragraph is still a press release excerpt. The student needs to paraphrase and critique rather than simply reproduce verbatim text.
The depth of detail in this passage provides comprehensive insight into partner engagements and product plans, which is a strong foundation for analysis.
The significant performance increase claim (â¼8Ã latency improvement) is presented without critique. The student should question methodology or compare against alternative sources.
Extract quantitative data points from this section into a table or summary. Then discuss how ROCm 6 optimizations influence AMDâs competitive positioning.
This subsection heading appears without accompanying analysis. The student must connect the leadership initiatives to the overall argument or research question.
Identify and highlight specific performance metrics or product features here and discuss their strategic implications for AMDâs market position.
Reflect on the forward-looking statementsâ risks and uncertainties. How might these caveats affect the credibility of AMDâs projections?
The new document begins abruptly without a transition. Add a brief introduction to explain its relevance and scope.
There is no research question guiding this inclusion. Clarify what inquiry you are addressing and why this article is selected.
This placeholder suggests an OCR or formatting error. Ensure headings are clear and meaningful within the IA structure.
Link this contextual introduction to your central research question. How does AMDâs positioning against Nvidia advance your analysis?
This section title stands alone. Provide analysis following the heading to interpret the significance of the AMDâNvidia rivalry.
Statistics on market share are presented without critical discussion. The student should compare multiple sources or consider trend implications.
The quote is included but not interrogated. The student must evaluate the credibility or bias of the analystâs opinion.
Discuss the backlogâs strategic impact on AMDâs market share and pricing power rather than leaving it unexamined.
This preview of Nvidiaâs H200 pipeline contextualizes competitive pressures effectively and could inform comparative analysis.
This subheading introduces a comparison but lacks subsequent commentary. The student should follow up with substantive analysis.
Explain how the announcement of the MI400 contributes to AMDâs strategic outlook and research focus on AI competitiveness.
